title: Food - Dinner at Anna's
description: Listen, then prove you were listening

_voiceScript.script:
Anna: Sara, dnes večer varím večeru. Čo ješ rada?
Sara: Ďakujem, Anna! Ale som vegetariánka. Nejem mäso a nejem ryby.
Anna: Aha, dobre. A syr? Vajcia?
Sara: Syr a vajcia jem. Ale pozor — som alergická na cesnak.
Anna: Žiadny cesnak, rozumiem. Urobím cestoviny so zeleninou.
Sara: Mňam! Aká zelenina?
Anna: Paprika, paradajka, cibuľa a mrkva.
Sara: Výborne. Cibuľu mám veľmi rada.
Anna: A na dezert máme ovocie — jahody a hrozno.
Sara: Sladké! To bude chutné.
Anna: Prinesieš chlieb?
Sara: Áno, kúpim chlieb. Dovidenia večer!

exercises.instruction: Tap every word or expression you heard in the conversation.

exercises.conversationTranscriptSk:
Anna: Sara, dnes večer varím večeru. Čo ješ rada?
Sara: Ďakujem, Anna! Ale som vegetariánka. Nejem mäso a nejem ryby.
Anna: Aha, dobre. A syr? Vajcia?
Sara: Syr a vajcia jem. Ale pozor — som alergická na cesnak.
Anna: Žiadny cesnak, rozumiem. Urobím cestoviny so zeleninou.
Sara: Mňam! Aká zelenina?
Anna: Paprika, paradajka, cibuľa a mrkva.
Sara: Výborne. Cibuľu mám veľmi rada.
Anna: A na dezert máme ovocie — jahody a hrozno.
Sara: Sladké! To bude chutné.
Anna: Prinesieš chlieb?
Sara: Áno, kúpim chlieb. Dovidenia večer!

questions.questionEn: Anna asks what Sara likes to eat. What does Sara say she doesn't eat?
questions.answerMeaning: Nejem = I don't eat. Sara is a vegetarian (vegetariánka) — she doesn't eat meat (mäso) or fish (ryby).

reviewPair.english: I don't eat meat and I don't eat fish.

questions.questionEn: Sara says 'som alergická na cesnak.' What is she allergic to?
questions.answerMeaning: Cesnak = garlic. Som alergická na... = I am allergic to... (the feminine form — Sara is a woman).

questions.questionEn: What will Anna cook for dinner?
questions.answerMeaning: Cestoviny = pasta, so zeleninou = with vegetables. Anna will make pasta with vegetables — and no garlic!

questions.questionEn: Anna lists the vegetables. Which one does Sara say she really likes?
questions.answerMeaning: Cibuľa = onion. Cibuľu mám veľmi rada = I really like onion (rada — feminine form).

questions.questionEn: What fruit will they have for dessert?
questions.answerMeaning: Jahody = strawberries, hrozno = grapes. Na dezert = for dessert. Ovocie = fruit.

questions.questionEn: What will Sara bring in the evening?
questions.answerMeaning: Chlieb = bread. Kúpim chlieb = I will buy bread. Anna asks Prinesieš chlieb? = Will you bring bread?

sentences.promptEn: But I am a vegetarian. (Sara — feminine)
I don't eat meat and I don't eat fish.
